summary.title: Enrichment worker hardening and next steps
summary.body_text: The enrichment worker should fail corrupted payloads instead of silently falling back on invalid source_type. Completed derivation runs need a non-null completed_at timestamp, and the artifact-not-found branch needs focused test coverage. After those fixes, the next milestone is replacing the stub pipeline with a real enrichment path.

classifications.title: Fix failure handling in the worker
classifications.body_text: The artifact is centered on correcting worker failure semantics and missing coverage.

memories.title: Invalid source_type should fail the job
memories.body_text: The enrichment worker should fail corrupted payloads rather than substituting a loaded artifact type when source_type is invalid.

memories.title: Completed runs require completed_at
memories.body_text: A derivation run marked completed must also write a completed_at timestamp.

memories.title: Add artifact-not-found test coverage
memories.body_text: A focused worker test should verify that the artifact-not-found path fails the job without derived writes.

memories.title: Task 12 replaces the stub pipeline
memories.body_text: The next milestone after worker hardening is replacing the stub processor with a real enrichment path.
